overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a dark, neon-lit underground market. The journey begins in a dimly lit back room with seated NPCs, transitions through graffiti-covered corridors, and emerges into a bustling commercial area with food stalls, medical facilities, and various vendors before reaching an open industrial street.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dark interior space past seated individuals

white plastic chairs arranged in the seating area
stacked cardboard boxes and storage containers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit, enclosed back room with concrete walls and industrial shelving. Several NPCs are seated on white plastic chairs scattered throughout the space. The camera moves forward through the room toward a corridor exit visible in the distance.

events.description: exits dark interior room into narrow corridor with graffiti-covered walls

agents.ego_description: moving through narrow corridor toward the brightly lit market entrance

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
doorway leading to brightly lit market area with visible neon glow
white mannequin standing against the corridor wall

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the dark room into a narrow corridor with graffiti-covered walls. A white mannequin stands against the left wall as the camera approaches a doorway glowing with neon light from the market beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit market square with medical services

agents.ego_description: walking through bustling market past various vendors and shoppers

vendor with cybernetic enhancements working at stall counter

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a vibrant neon-lit market dominated by a large green medical cross sign. Various market stalls line the walkway, including a medical facility on the left and food vendors on the right. The crowd density increases as the camera moves through the bustling commercial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: food vendor area with cooking stations

events.description: navigates around food preparation counter while moving through narrow market aisle

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow market aisle between food preparation counters

notable_agents.action: vendor in white hood and apron preparing food at counter
customer in yellow jacket seated at food stall counter

entered.detail: stainless steel food preparation counter with cooking equipment
shelving units with warm orange backlighting displaying containers
commercial cooking stations and food preparation appliances

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrower section of the market focused on food services. A vendor in a white hood works at a preparation counter on the left while customers sit at stools. Warm orange lighting from shelving units contrasts with the cooler neon tones of the main market area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial market street with vehicle debris

events.description: exits covered market stalls into open street with industrial machinery and vehicle wreckage

agents.ego_description: walking down open street toward distant lights and industrial structures

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead toward the end of the street

entered.detail: wide open street extending into the distance with scattered debris
wrecked vehicle parts and mechanical debris along the street edge
large industrial equipment and mechanical structures with red lighting

segments.scene_description: The environment opens up into a wide industrial street with asphalt ground surface. Large machinery with red neon lighting lines the left side while vehicle debris sits on the right. The crowd thins out as the camera moves toward the distant end of the street where more structures are visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed industrial room into a vibrant neon-lit underground market that eventually opens onto a wide industrial street. It begins by moving through a concrete back room filled with seated NPCs and industrial shelving, proceeding toward a distant exit. As the camera transitions into a narrow, graffiti-covered corridor past a lone white mannequin, the space suddenly expands into a bustling commercial hub dominated by a glowing green medical cross and crowded vendor stalls. The scene then shifts through a more intimate food service area where warm orange lighting contrasts with the surrounding neon before the environment opens up once more. Finally, the camera emerges onto a broad asphalt street lined with red-lit machinery and vehicle debris as the crowd thins toward the distant structures.
